scripts.storybook: pnpm --filter @inclusiv-ds/button build && pnpm --filter @inclusiv-ds/input build && pnpm --filter @inclusiv-ds/badge build && pnpm --filter @inclusiv-ds/spinner build && pnpm --filter @inclusiv-ds/typography build && pnpm --filter @inclusiv-ds/checkbox build && pnpm --filter @inclusiv-ds/radio build && pnpm --filter @inclusiv-ds/toggle build && pnpm --filter @inclusiv-ds/form-field build && pnpm --filter @inclusiv-ds/dialog build && pnpm --filter @inclusiv-ds/container build && storybook dev -p 6006 --no-open
scripts.build:storybook: pnpm --filter @inclusiv-ds/button build && pnpm --filter @inclusiv-ds/input build && pnpm --filter @inclusiv-ds/badge build && pnpm --filter @inclusiv-ds/spinner build && pnpm --filter @inclusiv-ds/typography build && pnpm --filter @inclusiv-ds/checkbox build && pnpm --filter @inclusiv-ds/radio build && pnpm --filter @inclusiv-ds/toggle build && pnpm --filter @inclusiv-ds/form-field build && pnpm --filter @inclusiv-ds/dialog build && pnpm --filter @inclusiv-ds/container build && storybook build
